name: Lauryn Hill
abstract: Lauryn Noelle Hill (born May 26, 1975) is an American rapper, singer, and songwriter. She is considered one of the most influential musicians of her time.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Lauryn Hill
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: George Wein
about_quotes.evidence: But when you put Lauryn Hill on the other stage, there were a huge number of African American faces because she's playing the music that reflects their lives.
about_quotes.doc_title: George Wein — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
